spec:
-- Supabase RPC Functions (call via supabase.rpc())

-- Stop timer and create entry atomically
-- Returns: time_entries row
SELECT stop_timer_and_create_entry(p_notes := 'optional notes');
-- Throws exception if no active timer found

-- Set monthly goal (handles partial unique indexes)
-- For overall goal (all categories):
SELECT set_monthly_goal(
    p_month := '2024-03-01'::date,
    p_target_hours := 40.0
);
-- For per-category goal:
SELECT set_monthly_goal(
    p_month := '2024-03-01'::date,
    p_target_hours := 20.0,
    p_category_id := 'uuid-here'
);
